scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/schemas typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/http-client typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/admin typecheck
scripts.test: vitest run --config ./vitest.config.ts packages/schemas/tests/**/*.test.ts packages/http-client/tests/**/*.test.ts apps/web/tests/**/*.test.ts apps/admin/tests/**/*.test.ts && bun run --cwd apps/server test
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/schemas build && bun run --cwd packages/http-client build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/admin build
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run build
